data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: User interfaces are simplified to limit the number of choices presented at any given time.
data.technical_spec: Strategic use of minimalistic design elements to enhance decision-making.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Interactive UI components are designed for easy and quick access, minimizing user effort.
data.technical_spec: Design practices ensure larger, reachable buttons and links for critical actions.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Content is broken down into smaller chunks to help users better process and remember information.
data.technical_spec: Use of concise text blocks and visual hierarchy throughout the site.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: The site is designed with familiar navigation patterns and interactions to meet user expectations.
data.technical_spec: Consistency in interface design, leveraging common web standards.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: UI is designed to be visually appealing, increasing perceived usability and acceptance.
data.technical_spec: Application of Apple's design philosophy with high-quality imagery and clean layouts.
